summary: Critical failure: the multi-line OutOfMemoryError exception block (lines 9-14) — including 'java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space' and all stack frames (CacheLoader.java:142, InvoiceService.java:213, InvoiceController.java:64) — is completely absent from the capsule evidence; the escalating Full GC pause times (0.04→1.84→3.41→4.01s) showing heap exhaustion building are also missing; the only root_cause entry is the downstream 'unhandled OutOfMemoryError' handler log (line 15), not the actual OOM throw site, so an engineer handed this capsule cannot identify which code path exhausted the heap.
improvements: Capture the full OutOfMemoryError exception block (lines 9-14) as root_cause evidence, preserving at minimum 'java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space' and the top frame 'com.acme.cache.CacheLoader.loadRegion(CacheLoader.java:142)' — these are the diagnostic facts that make the incident actionable

Include the Full GC pause escalation sequence (lines 5-8, pauses growing from 0.04s to 4.0s with ParOldGen at 2621440K reclaiming almost nothing) as trigger evidence to show the heap-exhaustion buildup
The 'unhandled OutOfMemoryError' GlobalExceptionHandler log (line 15) is a consequence, not root_cause — the OOM throw itself is the root cause; fix the role assignment
